## Overview

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Wants BLUF — bottom line first, then evidence
- Reads written status updates more carefully than slides
- Prefers a one-pager monthly over weekly emails
- Direct question in a meeting means he wants a direct answer — no hedging
- Has a standing skip-level program — every IC on the team gets a 1:1 with him quarterly
